texto: I am very hopeful that my personal success in Qatar will ignite others, especially those in the so-called non-traditional sports, to try even harder because now they can see for themselves that significant achievements can be attained. But let me stress that it takes a lot of work - in fact, very hard work - mixed with very heavy doses of patience.
explicacao: Citação de Alia Atkinson sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “I am very hopeful that my personal success in Qatar will ignite others, especially those in the s…” articula sucesso, work, success em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e success.
